scripts.test: node tests/test-parsers.mjs && node tests/test-chunked-write.mjs && node tests/test-open-in-terminal.mjs && node tests/test-project-picker.mjs && node tests/test-project-listener.mjs

0.9.0: Auto-switch direction inverted: the panel now follows Muxy's active project (Muxy → extension) instead of pushing project changes to Muxy (extension → Muxy). When you change the active project in Muxy, the panel filter updates automatically and the picker button reflects the new project.

The v0.8.0/v0.8.1 auto-switch (which called muxy.projects.switchTo from picker clicks and breadcrumb clicks) has been removed. Picker and breadcrumb clicks now only filter the local view — they do not change Muxy's active project.

New file src/panel/project-change-listener.js: pure helpers (extractPathFromProjectEvent, setupProjectChangeListener, PROJECT_CHANGE_CANDIDATES) that subscribe to a candidate list of Muxy project-change events and apply the new path to the panel. Extracted for unit testability.

When the user is reading a conversation in detail view and Muxy switches projects, the detail view is preserved — only state.projectFilter and the list are updated. The detail view reflects the new filter when the user navigates back.

The 'openInTerminal' flow (v0.5) still auto-switches Muxy to the project that owns the conversation before opening the terminal, so the terminal's cwd matches the conversation. This is a different use case (preparing context for an action) and is intentionally preserved.
0.7.0: Project picker menu with search, replacing the static <select> dropdown
Click on a conversation now resumes the session in a terminal; Cmd/Ctrl+Click opens the detail view
Breadcrumb navigation in the detail view (clickable to filter by subpath)
Path abbreviation with ~ for $HOME in conversation list
Copy path action in the 3-dot menu
Cmd+P / Ctrl+P global shortcut to open the project picker
Project detection fix: cache invalidation on refresh, ~ and $HOME expansion in OpenCode sessions
Removed 'Open in Terminal' from the 3-dot menu (now the primary click action)
0.8.0: Auto-switch to the selected project: choosing a project in the picker (or clicking a breadcrumb in the detail view) switches Muxy to that project when a matching one exists. The next resume in terminal then skips the project switch step. The switch is silent (status bar only).
0.8.1: Auto-switch (v0.8.0) was too silent: failures (no match, list/switchTo errors) and the already-active case had no UI feedback. Now every outcome emits a status bar message (warn/err/ok) and every step logs a [ai-history] diagnostic line to the console for easy debugging in Muxy DevTools.

muxy.description: View conversation history from Claude Code and OpenCode inside Muxy.
